title: verilator generates incorrect code when if/else is used inside function

features.name: if_else with return in function returning bit-concatenated value
features.description: Code should include a function with if/else returning different values using bit concatenation, where both branches contain return statements

features.name: function return value computed from indexed bit slice
features.description: Code should include a function that returns a value computed by indexing into a bit slice of the function argument using $bits
